title: UpdateTaskRequest
description: Request body for updating an existing task. All fields are optional.

name.description: The updated name of the task.

description.description: The updated description in rich text format.

markdown_description.description: The updated description in Markdown format.

add.description: Array of user IDs to add as assignees.

rem.description: Array of user IDs to remove from assignees.

status.description: The updated status of the task.

priority.description: Updated task priority. 1 is Urgent, 2 is High, 3 is Normal, 4 is Low.

due_date.description: Updated due date as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

due_date_time.description: Whether the due date includes a time component.

start_date.description: Updated start date as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

start_date_time.description: Whether the start date includes a time component.

parent.description: The task ID of the parent task. Set to null to remove parent.

archived.description: Whether to archive or unarchive the task.
